name: Llucmaçanes
description: A rural hamlet near Maó, a small traditional Menorcan settlement of white houses in the south-eastern countryside. Not a destination in itself but an authentic glimpse of the island's inland, agricultural heart. On the first weekend of August it celebrates its own festes de Sant Gaietà, jaleo included.

highlights: a white rural hamlet off the tourist routes
the south-eastern countryside and its traditional farmhouses
a brief, quiet stop on the way between Maó and the south coast
